content.speakerText: Thanks for riding with CityTaxi! Have a great day!
content.speakerTextCn: 感谢乘坐城市出租车！祝您今天愉快！

options.text: Thank you! You were very helpful.
How much do I owe you?
Can you drop me at the next corner?

content.explanation: 正确答案是 'Thank you! You were very helpful.'，因为它礼貌地回应了司机的感谢并表达了对服务的认可。其他选项均不恰当：'Okay, see you later.' 缺乏感谢；'How much do I owe you?' 适用于付费环节而非道别；'Can you drop me at the next corner?' 是乘车时的指令，与道别场景无关。

content.speakerText: I really appreciate your help today!
content.speakerTextCn: 我真的很感谢你今天的帮助！

options.text: No problem, I'll see you tomorrow.
You're welcome! Have a wonderful day!
I'm not sure about the fare.
Can you turn up the music?

content.explanation: 正确答案是 'You're welcome! Have a wonderful day!'，这是对感谢的自然回应，并回赠祝福，符合道别场景的礼貌规范。其他选项中，'No problem...' 语境不符（通常用于回应道歉而非感谢），后两项与道别无关。

options.text: I hope you enjoy your stay in the city!
I need to refill the tank.

content.explanation: 正确答案是 'I hope you enjoy your stay in the city!'，它在回应感谢的同时，表达了友好祝愿，符合道别与评价场景。其他选项涉及司机的工作事务或乘客的后续需求，不适合用于结束对话。
